import { Subject } from './Subject'; /** * A variant of Subject that only emits a value when it completes. It will emit * its latest value to all its observers on completion. */ export declare class AsyncSubject<T> extends Subject<T> { private _value; private _hasValue; private _isComplete; next(value: T): void; complete(): void; } //# sourceMappingURL=AsyncSubject.d.ts.map
